chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p6::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: The KNS project: on trail • A successful commissioning process, except for some few incidents • The 1st metal tapping occurred in April 2013 • The NST process has demonstrated its capacity to function • So far, the process has shown good environmental performances Société Le Nickel – SLN : fighting the cost problem • In 2009, SLN announced plan to increase its competitiveness – 8,5 GXPF achieved vs 10,7 GXPF planned – 2181 employees vs 2100 planned (2369 in 2009) • Mid term perspective to increase production – 2012 : 60 000T planned, 56 000T achieved – 2014 : 65 000T planned • Efforts to explore and exploit new tenements in order to compensate for decreasing nickel grade and unadequate chemical properties – Grand Saint Pierre (Thio) – Stamboul (Kouaoua) – Union Révolution (Houaïlou) • Decision taken in December 2012 to switch the factory electricity plant to coal • Will Doniambo finally be tolerated in the urban environment of Noumea ? – Continuous investments for environment – Creation of a local committee

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p4::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: The nickel industry in NC : pursuing its development 0 200 400 600 800 1 000 1 200 1 400 oct-10 nov-10 déc-10 janv-11 févr-11 mars-11 avr-11 mai-11 juin-11 juil-11 août-11 sept-11 oct-11 nov-11 déc-11 janv-12 févr-12 mars-12 avr-12 mai-12 juin-12 juil-12 août-12 sept-12 oct-12 nov-12 déc-12 janv-13 févr-13 mars-13 avr-13 mai-13 Production (mT) NHC NiO The Goro project: the future of New Caledonia mining industry at stake • 3 major incidents since 2009 (acid leak in April 2009, fall of the SX column in April 2010, and acid plant shutdown in may 2012) • Remains a key project for NC given the importance of the limonite resources in the South • Important issues beyond the technical ones: – How to secure a public participation in the project given the tight public financing capacities and the huge construction budget ? – How to secure the long term support of the communities and local sub-contractors ?

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p1::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: The mining industry in New-Caledonia Nickel Conference – Nouméa July 2, 2013 Latest developments and strategy perspectives Aurélien Louis, Jean-Sébastien Baille – Nickel Conference Mining in New-Caledonia has a century long history. The question is: what awaits us now ? 1969 - 1973 1990 First environmental techniques Mining “boom” Modern times From 4% Ni to 2,5% Ni 2009 2004 - 2008 The 21st century From 2,5% Ni to ?% Ni Mining development plan and code Two major nickel projects launched + Posco deal Local ownership development policy : SLN - SMSP 1864 1873 1911 1950 Discovery of nickel by Jules Garnier First mine opened in Mont Dore Doniambo factory starts producing Old fashion mining period From 15% Ni to 4% Ni What’s next? Agenda • The nickel industry in New-Caledonia : pursuing its development • From a brand new mining law to the birth of an industrial policy in NC ? • Focus: the nickel resources inventory

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p8::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: SMSP – Posco JV : the challenge of supply • After a phase of technical feasibility study, the decision has been taken to expand the plant capacity from 30 000 to 54 000 tons of nickel. • The challenge will be to go from a mining production of 1.6 to 3.9 million wmt of ore, ie the equivalent of the SLN mining production • Will require : – Significant mining investments – Increase the productivity (equipment availability, production hours, mining ratio) – Restart exploration for LT supply – (Re)open mining centers : Ouaco, Poya, Kouaoua, Nakety + Boakaine • On an NC perspective, opportunity to decrease the nickel grade ~ 2% • For the ramp-up period, can local ore trades help bridge the supply gap for the plant ? A complete change of scope for NMC The « small miners » and our foreign partners : ajusting for decreasing ore grade • Nickel grade of ore exported to Japan • “Stériles de laverie” = new by-products sold to Nippon Yakin and Pamco – Dry product, Ni content< 1.6% 1,80% 1,90% 2,00% 2,10% 2,20% 2,30% 2,40% 2,50% 2000 2001 2002 2003 2004 2005 2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012

chunk.text: An active mining cadastral system 53% 16% 13% 8% 4% 4% 2% SLN Ballande NMC Vale SMGM KNS Autres Relative share of the total permit surface • Although 70% of the peridotite surface is covered by a mining permit, the mining registry continues to show a great deal of activity • Since 2009: – 5 APM – 72 research permits have been awarded – 18 mining tenements • The drilling work ungergone since 2009 has increased the tenement surface recovered from 50% to 65% • In average, 27 exploration campaigns per year are authorized. chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: Prony & Pernod : preparing for the future Perspectives for future development The production rate in NC doesn’t seem excessive with regard to its known reserves, but will undergo a strong increase linked to Korea exports and the new projects. One must remain vigilant about the local human and technical capacity to meet these production objectives. Another key focus is the capacity to access to new resources on a socially acceptable basis. Opportunities for the development of NC nickel resources will be assessed on the basis of sustainability (“preparing the long term future of current investments”), optimization (“finding customers for low grade ore”) and maximization of local added value (“climbing up the value chain”) From the mining law to the birth of an industrial strategy: can we reconcile the opposites?

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p10::c1
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: e chain”) From the mining law to the birth of an industrial strategy: can we reconcile the opposites? • New authorization procedure for mining works : – involving public enquiry, – environmental and socio-econonomic studies, – a special administrative police, – financial guarantees for environmental works • From 2012 to 2015, every existing mining site will go through this authorization procedure – 31 sites – Already heated debates on some locations (Thio) – The goal is to set individual administrative authorization, with technical prescriptions, rehabilitation objectives, etc.. • The “police des mines” is now in action: – Since 2009, 42 administrative order issued – 7 police report preliminary of judicial actions • The “Réserves Techniques Provinciales”, a legislative framework to secure resources, for future metallurgic development: – Used for the first time in February 2012 for Prony & Pernod The new mining code has proved itself to be a modern regulation tool of the mining sector

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p16::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: The industrial strategic committee: a permanent forum to bring together opposite views on nickel • In NC, the government and the provinces share responsibilities in the field of mining policy • Since 2010, regular meetings between elected representatives have been organized in order to build a common vision on what the industrial policy of NC should be. • A preliminary report has been drafted in 2012, based on extensive research: – The nickel resources inventory – Economic analysis of the added value of each development model – Technical analysis of the laterite processing technologies – Socio-economic work on the impact of mining • The work is under progress, in order to reach some kind of consensus. Extra technical work is being done: – The analysis of the nickel market in 2020 (Jim Lennon/Wood Mac Kenzy) – Preliminary assessment of the SMVRM • The opportunity to discuss further those topics will be given by NC2025

chunk.chunk_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии::p17::c0
chunk.doc_id: Материалы конференций__Aurelien_Louis_Горная промышленность в Новой Каледонии
chunk.text: A point of consensus : the necessity to preserve the interests of the next generations through a sovereign fund • Many pacific Islands have built sovereign funds. All share similar situations: – Small population – Inequalities in the economic fabric – Isolation – Budget volatility • Nickel in NC has generated significant economic development but is a non-renewable resource. There is a widespread consensus on the necessity to preserve future generations from the risk of exhaustion. • A sovereign fund could offer a solution. A first source of foreseen funding will be a mining royalty. Such a royalty doesn’t exist so far in New Caledonia, whereas it is widespread in mining countries Another point of consensus: exploring the other resources (inc.

Scandium) Matrice de criticité (EU Raw Materials Initiative) Strategic metals Oil & Gas in the EEZ The nickel resources inventory • Calculated by DIMENC (surpac) with constraints (side effect, minimal thickness of mineralizations, limited influence area) • Methodology audited by Pierre CHARLENT (Geology consultant) • No correspondence with JORC but somewhere around “Indicated Resources” • Results are near mining operator ones (KNS, VALE NC, SMSP, etc.) • Some variations due to methodology but no big differences • Based on 61 000 drill holes (1 650 Km) collected from mining companies Nickel Resources Inventory Approach
